pr.title: The Frugendorff: Recursive Weight Sharing for Transformer Compression (1.1478 BPB, 15.19MB)

output.summary: Shared-transformer loops reuse six blocks to simulate deeper nets while asymmetric crawler blocks and bidirectional deliberation gates stabilize recursion.
techniques: Recursive weight sharing with loop-specific embeddings
Asymmetric flat+crawler split to limit gradient conflict
Bidirectional deliberation gate for recursive consensus
